items.title: Leerink Partners Maintains a Hold on Amgen (AMGN)
items.description: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is one of the best affordable growth stocks to buy. Leerink Partners analyst David Risinger maintained their neutral stance on Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) on August 26, giving the stock a Hold rating. The analyst told investors in a research note that he expects the recent approval of Repatha’s expanded label to boost […]

items.title: Nio, Signet Jewelers, Amgen: Trending Tickers
items.description: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman touches on this morning's top trending stock tickers, including Nio (NIO) after the EV developer reported its second quarter results, Signet Jewelers (SIG) latest earnings beat, and Amgen's (AMGN) $600 million investment into a US research facility. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

items.title: AMGEN INVESTING MORE THAN HALF A BILLION DOLLARS IN NEW, STATE-OF-THE-ART CENTER FOR SCIENCE AND INNOVATION AT U.S. GLOBAL HEADQUARTERS
items.description: Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) today announced plans to invest more than $600 million in a new, state-of-the-art center for science and innovation at its global headquarters in Thousand Oaks, California.
